title: What is BareMetal Infrastructure on Azure? - Azure Baremetal Infrastructure
description: Provides an overview of the BareMetal Infrastructure on Azure.
summary: Microsoft Azure offers a cloud infrastructure with a wide range of integrated cloud services to meet your business needs. In some cases, though, you may need to run services on bare metal servers without a virtualization layer. You may need root access and control over the operating system (OS). To meet this need, Azure offers BareMetal Infrastructure for several high-value, mission-critical applications.
